message: Create tracker for open Dependabot alert #24 | explicit_unset=dependencies,learnings,blocked_by,blocked_reason,unblock_note

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Remediated in GH findings sweep: upgraded undici to 8.0.1, updated dependency stack to patched versions, added brace-expansion override >=5.0.5, and verified pnpm audit --prod/--all report zero vulnerabilities.

author: codex-agent

patch.value: Dependency remediation verified locally; no remaining known vulnerabilities in current dependency graph.

message: Close: dependency remediation verified via pnpm audit --prod/--all (0 vulnerabilities) plus full regression and coverage passes.
